articles.title: ‘Slow-cial’ app Roost forces you to slow down to the speed of a carrier pigeon
articles.description: This developer didn't expect his side project to grow to 300,000 users, but people love Roost because it's an alternative to an always-on, fast-paced online culture.
articles.summary: Developer John Merrick created the 'Slow-cial', or Roost, app as a reaction against our speedy digital communication norms and it unexpectedly gained popularity.
points: Roost requires users to send messages at an intentionally slow pace resembling carrier pigeon delivery times, promoting thoughtfulness in online interactions.
The app's unique approach led to a substantial increase in user engagement and growth beyond developer expectations.
Despite the unconventional design, Roost has garnered positive attention as an antidote for digital communication overload.
articles.insight: Roost introduces mindfulness into social media practices by deliberately slowing down message delivery speed. This concept challenges our fast-paced online culture and could influence future developments in fostering healthier, more thoughtful communication technologies within the IT industry.

articles.title: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
articles.description: General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.
articles.summary: General Intuition invests in training foundational models using video game data as a way to simplify robot development by requiring less real-world input.
points: A startup named General Intuition is leveraging massive amounts of video games for AI research, potentially revolutionizing physical robots' capabilities and reducing the need for extensive real-world training datasets.
The approach centers around using gamer intuition to teach a robot how to interact with objects in its environment effectively by mimicking human play styles through artificial intelligence.
This method could accelerate AI advancin's integration into the physical world, making robots more adaptable and interactive.
articles.insight: General Intuition's unique approach may set a new precedent for robotic development in industries where human-like interaction with complex objects is crucial. The reduced reliance on real-world data collection could also expedite AI deployment across various sectors.

articles.title: Elon Musk says X will send DMs when posts you’ve engaged with are corrected
articles.description: X plans to send users direct messages when posts they’ve liked, replied to, or reposted receive Community Notes, an update aimed at addressing criticism that the platform’s crowdsourced fact-checking system often arrives too late to curb misinformation.
articles.summary: Elon Musk announced X will notify users via direct messages if their engaged posts are later corrected by the community.
points: X plans to implement a new notification system for misinformation correction
The update is in response to criticisms of late fact-checking arrivals on the platform
Users will receive DMs when they interact with posts that are later corrected
articles.insight: This approach by X may encourage more timely corrections and foster a proactive community engagement, but it also raises questions about potential misuse for fearmongering or unnecessary alarms.

articles.title: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
articles.description: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.
articles.summary: Google Photos has introduced an AI-driven 'Video Remix' tool that allows users to edit their videos using various effects such as relighting dark scenes or replacing backgrounds.
points: The new Video Remix feature in Google Photos can apply cinematic relighting, change plain backgrounds with fun ones, and add artistic styles to user-uploaded videos.
Users have the capability to enhance their video quality through adjustments like increasing brightness or modifying visual effects without extensive technical knowledge.
Google'semphasis on accessibility for all users indicates a trend towards AI tools in social media platforms.
articles.insight: The Video Remix tool by Google represents an expansion of user-friendly video editing capabilities through artificial intelligence, potentially setting a precedent that could affect the future development and adoption of similar features across various IT/technology industries.

articles.title: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
articles.description: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move through space and time — an essential skill for producing intelligence that generalizes. That gap, it turns out, might be filled by gaming data. That’s the bet behind General Intuition, a […]
articles.summary: General Intuition is an organization that believes video game experiences can provide better training for artificial general intelligence (AGI) than internet data due to their dynamic and interactive nature.
points: Video games offer immersive, real-time interactions with complex systems unlike static text or browsing the web.
Gaming simulations involve problem solving in physics-based scenarios relevant for AGI development.
The company General Intuition is betting on using gaming data as a superior source over internet datasets.
articles.insight: This perspective challenges conventional wisdom by valuing interactive and simulation experiences derived from video games, potentially opening new pathways in AI training beyond traditional textual or tabular data sources.

articles.title: Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
articles.description: Meta is adding a new safeguard to stop people from secretly recording others with its AI glasses. But the update comes as the company continues to expand how much personal data its AI products collect and use.
articles.summary: Meta is adding a new safeguard to stop people from secretly recording others with its AI glasses. But the update comes as the company continues to expand how much personal data its AI products collect and use

articles.title: OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations
articles.description: OpenAI says its new voice mode can speak and listen at the same time, a key ability for live translation.
articles.summary: OpenAI says its new voice mode can speak and listen at the same time, a key ability for live translation
points: OpenAI says its new voice mode can speak and listen at the same time, a key ability for live transla...

articles.title: Crypto VC firm Paradigm raises $1.2B to invest in ‘technical frontier’ startups
articles.description: For Paradigm, the technical frontier will stretch beyond its cryptocurrency investment roots. This fund is expected to expand its investment focus to include robotics and AI.
articles.summary: Paradigm Venture Capital firm raised $1.2 billion with the intention of focusing on what it calls 'technical frontier' startups that include robotics and artificial intelligence.
points: Paradigm VC has announced a fundraise of $1 endowed for technical ventures beyond cryptocurrency investments, expanding into AI-driven companies such as autonomous vehicles startup Nutonomy

The company is looking to raise at least another $300 million in the coming months through external parties and expects that by year's end it could top its initial fundraise of about a billion dollars.
Paradigm VC has already invested heavily into robotics companies, including one-third of their portfolio to date.
articles.insight: The Paradigm venture capital firm is signaling the increasing importance and influence that AI startups are having on modern technology industries beyond just cryptocurrencies. This shows how investors recognize a broader tech ecosystem where blockchain, robotics, and artificial intelligence converge.

articles.title: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A to help enterprises build their own AI agents
articles.description: Founded in 2024, Prime Intellect’s goal is to give organizations capabilities to train their own agentic systems without relying on frontier AI labs.
articles.summary: Prime Intellect has raised $130M in Series A funding with the aim of helping enterprises develop their own AI systems autonomously.
points: Founded in 2024, Prime Intellect's mission is to empower organizations by enabling them to create and train agentic systems independently from advanced AI labs like Google Brain or OpenAI.

The company has secured $130M Series A funding led by Accel-Kleiner Capital with participation from previous investors such as Andreessen Horowitz, Microsoft Innovation Fund, and Samsung Ventures. Prime Intellect plans to use this capital primarily for product development including software tools that simplify the process of building customizable agentic systems.
Prime Intellect is targeting enterprises across industries with its AI capabilities, offering solutions tailored specifically towards their business needs.
articles.insight: This funding boost could accelerate Prime Intellect's goal to democratize accessibility of advanced AI technologies for a wide range of organizations beyond the tech giants, potentially leading industry shifts by allowing more companies to build customized agentic systems.

articles.title: Another massive data breach exposed millions of driver’s license numbers
articles.description: The cyberattack targeting a U.S. insurance giant is the largest known breach of driver's license numbers so far in 2026.
articles.summary: A significant data breach has exposed millions of driver's license numbers at a U.S. insurance firm.
points: The cyberattack on the insurance company is unprecedented in scale, affecting hundreds of thousands or more individuals worldwide.
Authorities have yet to determine if personal information beyond driver's license numbers was compromised during this breach.
Insurance firms are increasingly becoming prime targets for cybercriminals due to the sensitive nature of their data.
articles.insight: This incident highlights an escalating trend in targeting insurance companies, underscoring the critical need for robust security measures within the industry to prevent such breaches and safeguard consumer information.

articles.title: These AI startups are growing revenue at faster and faster rates
articles.description: There are a lot of fast-growing AI startups, but some are growing even faster, they say.
articles.summary: AI startups exhibit rapid revenue growth rates within the technology sector.
points: Several AI startups are growing their revenues at unprecedent speeds according to industry insiders.

The trend of fast-growing businesses is not exclusive to Silicon Valley as similar dynamics can be observed in various tech hubs worldwide, signaling a global expansion and investment surge into AI startups.
Accelerating revenue growth rates could lead these companies towards maturity or even potential exits through acquisitions by larger enterprises.
articles.insight: The rapid increase in revenues among numerous AI-focused startups suggests heightened investor interest and confidence, which may pave the way for more consolidation within this subsector of technology. However, sustaining growth could pose challenges as these companies scale.

articles.title: Solo GP Ashley Smith announces second $25M fund to back startups in AI, security and more
articles.description: Vermilion Cliffs Ventures announced Wednesday the close of a $25 million Fund II.
articles.summary: AI entrepreneur Ashley Smith has secured an additional $25 million to fund startups in AI and security among others.
points: Solo GP firm SoloGP announced the close of a second Fund, worth $25M
Fund II will focus on backing early-stage companies across industries such as artificial intelligence (AI), cybersecurity, healthcare technology and smart cities
Smith'rancements are indicative of her personal commitment to advancing the tech sector
articles.insight: This fund will likely accelerate innovation in AI and security startups with ample capital for research, development and talent acquisition.

articles.title: Apple to produce Made in America wireless chips with Broadcom
articles.description: Apple has signed a $30 billion+ multiyear deal with Broadcom to design and produce more than 15 billion U.S.-made custom wireless connectivity chips for Apple products.
articles.summary: Apple has inked a massive contract worth over $30 billion with Broadcom to design and manufacture more than 15 billion U.in.-made custom wireless connectivity chips for Apple products.
points: Broadcom will create at least 15.6 billion Made-In-America (MIA) silicon solutions that serve as the key building blocks of high performance and next generation communications in smartphones, tablets and wearables from major brands such as Apple.
$30 billion deal between Broadcom & Applce to produce MIA chips for iPhones
First ever U.S.-made chip production facility being built by the likes of Qualcomm
articles.insight: This significant investment in domestic manufacturing capabilities has broad implications on reducing global supply chain vulnerabilities and shifting towards a more self-reliant technology sector.

articles.title: Venus Aerospace raises $90M Series B to build a new kind of rocket engine
articles.description: Build a new kind of rocket engine and the world will beat a path to your door.
articles.summary: Venus Aerospace has raised $90 million in Series B funding to develop an innovative new type of rocket engine.
points: Venus Aerospace secured a $90M investment for its groundbrerances
The company plans to construct and test their novel propulsion system within the next year with this funding
This substantial capital infusion is earmarked towards research, prototype development, and production capabilities
articles.insight: Venus Aerospace's investment signals strong market confidence in new rocket technologies which could reshape space exploration.

articles.title: Blue Origin reportedly raising $10B at $130B valuation
articles.description: Blue Origin is raising $10 billion at a $130 billion pre-money valuation from Coatue Asset Management, Bezos himself, and other big-name investors, The New York Times reported.
articles.summary: Blue Origin is raising $1 end of a major funding round led by the company's founder Jeff Bezos himself.
points: Jeff Bezos and Coatue Asset Management are leading Blue Origin'th$10 billion raise at a post-money valuation around $130 billion.
The deal could give Bezos more financial flexibility to pursue his interests, such as space exploration beyond government contracts with NASA or defense agencies like the Pentagon and Space Force.
Blue Origin has previously raised funds from other notable investors including Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates.
articles.insight: This significant funding could allow Blue Origin to accelerate their space exploration endeavours, potentially reshaping commercial opportunities in the industry and enhancing competition with rivals like SpaceX. The backing of a tech giant such as Amazon's Bezos provides substantial confidence for investors.

articles.title: Venus Williams-backed WeWard can now lock your apps until you hit your steps
articles.description: With funding from tennis star and angel investor Venus Williams, the French app WeWard says that it increases walking time by almost 25%.
articles.summary: WeWard has received backing from Venus Williams to create a solution aimed at increasing user's daily step count through locking their apps until they achieve specific walking targets.
points: Venus Williams invested in French app WeWard, which helps users increase their physical activity by temporarily restricting access to mobile applications while encouraging them to walk more throughout the day. This intervention has shown an approximate improvement of a quarter mile per hour (25%) on step counts.

The motivation behind this innovative approach is based on setting challenges that not only encourage users but also provide tangible rewards upon completion, with potential benefits to their physical and mental health. Venus Williams’ endorsement lends credibility as well as visibility in the crowded technology market.
The success of WeWard suggests a broader demand for gamified solutions within personal activity management apps, indicating an opportunity area where other tech investments could be made.
articles.insight: WeWard'semission and Venus Williams’ backing demonstrate the increasing interest in integrating behavioral science with technology to promote healthier lifestyles. The app not only encourages walking but also provides a unique value proposition by tying it directly to user engagement, indicating that gamified fitness solutions have significant potential within the industry.

articles.title: 엔클라우드, AI 영상관제 서비스 ‘The N’ 과기정통부 혁신제품 지정
articles.description: 클라우드 네이티브 기반 AI 영상관제 SaaS 서비스초기 구축비용 절감 및 장소에 관계없이 안정적인 영상 관제와 통합 운영[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 클라우드 전문기업 엔클라우드(대표 김원헌)의 클라우드 네이티브 AI 영상관제 서비스 ‘The N’이 과학기술정보통신부 소관 혁신제품에 지정됐다고 밝혔다. 이번 혁신제품 지정은 엔클라우드가 지난해 국내 최초로 CC
articles.summary: 엔클라우드는 AI 영상관제 서비스 'The N'에 대한 이래 전국 혁신제품 지정이다.
points: - 엔클라우드의 최초로 AI 영상관제 서비스 'The N'이 지났다.
- 구축비용이 절감되었다.
- 서비스는 장소에 관계없이 안전하게 통합된다.
articles.insight: 엔클라우드는 AI 영상관제 서비스 'The N'로 인한 근대한 환경을 제공하여 IT/기술 분앞에 큰 미생산이 되고 가카지를 개선시킬 수 tharefore.

articles.title: 캐나다 정보 기관, 안보 위협 해외 범죄 조직에 ‘사이버 역공’
articles.description: 랜섬웨어 그룹, 마약 판매 조직, 극단주의 단체 등 겨냥‘공세적 억지력’ 강화 행보[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 캐나다 사이버 안보 당국이 해외 범죄 조직에 역으로 해킹 공격을 가한 사실이 확인됐다.캐나다 신호정보국(CSE)은 국가 안보를 위협하는 해외 범죄 및 극단주의 단체 3곳을 대상으로 합법적인 ‘공세적 사이버 작전’(Active Cyber Operatio
articles.summary: 캐나다 CSE는 해외 범죄 조직에 '사이버 역공'를 통한 합병적인 정치적 방어작전을 취하고, 극단주의 단체 질병에 대해 확인한다.
points: CSE는 캐나다 옆바이 사이블(Cobalt Strike)과 유전체 원중 공격자(Wanna Cleaner)을 활용한 해외 번식 집단의 위임을 인식하고, 이를 방어한다.
CSE는 여성병원에서 운전화번식 및 노동권자 피해지의 방어와 국가 안보 보호를 할 수 0.25 리스크로 합니다.
CSE는 현재 한반도 서울, 인천에서 해외 범죄 조직의 대기업원들을 연간 지도하고, 국가 안보를 포함한 '공세적 사이버 작전'에 시합니다.
articles.insight: CSE의 행동은 해외 극단주의 및 범죄 사회에서의 적응성과 '공세적 사이버 작전' 마럴성을 보여줍니다.

articles.title: Hot French startup ZML releases free product to speed inference across lots of AI chips
articles.description: ZML, a hot French AI startup endorsed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has now released ZML/LLMD, software that could make running AI less costly.
articles.summary: ZML, a hot French AI startup endorsed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has now released ZML/LLMD, software that could make running AI less costly
points: ZML, a hot French AI startup endorsed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has now released ZML/LLMD, ...

Important changes and trends in the IT industry

articles.title: AI chip maker SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, 5 months after last mega round
articles.description: AI chip maker SambaNova has raised at an $11B valuation months after Intel was rumored to be trying to buy it for about $1.6 billion.
articles.summary: SambaNova, a start-up making AI chips, has closed its latest funding round at an $11B valuation five months after raising significant capital from Softbank's Arm division.
points: AI chip maker SambaNova closes another major financing deal with a new investor on board
The company achieved the record-setting funding round at $1B, elevating its valuation to an impressive $11B in five months' time.
Rumors of Intel seeking acquisition for SambaNova subsided as it successfully raised funds independently.
articles.insight: The success indicates strong confidence among investors about the future potential and scalability of AI chip manufacturing, potentially reshaping competition in this space with more start-ups following suit to secure capital for development.

articles.title: [카드뉴스] 파일 하나 누락에 거인 붕괴… AI 공급망 무너뜨리는 ‘인적 리스크’와 대응책
articles.description: 글로벌 AI 기업 앤트로픽의 ‘클로드’ 내부 소스코드 51만 줄이 외부에 유출되는 사고가 발생했으며, 그 원인은 외부 해커의 침투가 아닌 배포 설정 오류인 것으로 밝혀졌다. 이번 사고는 .npmignore 명령어 한 줄이 누락되는 사소한 인적 오류(Human Error)가 시스템 자동화를 타고 대규모 ‘자율형 유출’로 확산된 소프트웨어 공급망의 전형적인 보

articles.title: [ISEC 2026 미리보기] 엠클라우독, 폐쇄망에서 안전하게 쓰는 보안 AI 협업 에이전트 `딥코웍’ 선보여
articles.description: 온프레미스 문서중앙화 환경에서 생성형 AI 구동... 데이터 유출 원천 차단[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 엠클라우독은 20여년간 문서중앙화 시장을 이끌어 온 정보보호 전문기업으로, 제조·방위·공공·금융 등 600여 고객사에문서관리(EDMS)·유출방지(DLP)·문서보안(DRM)을 단일 플랫폼으로 통합한 솔루션을 공급하고 있다. 최근에는 문서중앙화에 인공지능을 결합
articles.summary: 온프레미스 기사는 엠클라우독이 인공지능을 활용한 보안 AI 협업 에이전트를 소개합니다. '딥코웍' 앱은 문서중알리스킬(DRM), 유출방지(DLP) 및 EDMS 사용자들에게 한국어로 제공합니다.
points: 온프레미스 기사는 '딥코웍' AI 활용 보안 에이전트를 소개한다
이 선공회에서는 인공지능을 활용해 문서중알리스키 구조화, 유출방지 및 EDMS사용자들에게 제공한다
이 기술은 IT/보안 업체가 고급의 보안적용과 효율성을 능리하는데 큰 역할을 해
articles.insight: 이러한 AI 협업 에이전트는 IT/보안 업계에서 문서 중앙출현과 보호력을 향상시켜준다.

articles.title: [ISEC 2026 미리보기] 엘에스웨어, AI 시대 보안의 답... 서버부터 공급망까지
articles.description: 서버보안·취약점 관리·오픈소스 거버넌스 핵심 솔루션 라인업 공개`SBOM·VEX 기반 공급망 거버넌스` 강연도 [보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 정보보안 전문기업 엘에스웨어(대표 김민수)는 2005년 설립 이래 서버보안·취약점 관리·오픈소스 거버넌스 분야에서 금융·공공·국방 등 국내 주요 산업군에 솔루션을 공급해 왔다. 최근 인도네시아 서수마트라주(West Suma
articles.summary: 이 기사는 SBOM·VEX를 통한 공급망 구조와 오픈소스 보안의 중요성에 대해 강연하여 서버보안 전문기업에서의 SBOM·VEX를 지원한 삽짝 작업을 실행하고 있는 솔루션 개발자인 김민수이사정의 결정으로 계승한 SBOM·VEX를 공개한다.
points: SBOM·VEX는 서버보안·취약점 관리와 오픈소스 거버넌스에 대한 강인한 시스템을 제공한다.
이 뉴스는 IT/기술 업계에서의 보안과정도를 나름 몇 가지 방법으로 소개한다.
김민수이사정은 SBOM·VEX를 통해서 공급망 구조와 오픈소스 보안의 중요성을 강불하고, 설명하여 기업에 대한 보호적용을 강정하고 있다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 IT/기술 업계에서 SBOM·VEX의 중요성과 보안적용에 대해 많은 정보를 제공하고, SBOM·VEX를 통해 공급망 구조와 오픈소스 보안의 중요성을 인식하여 기업에서의 보호적용을 강제로 준비하고 있다.

articles.title: 개인정보위, API 보안 주의보,,, “설계부터 개인정보 최소화해야”
articles.description: API가 웹 트래픽 57% 차지... 디지털 백도어 위험“서비스에 필요한 최소 정보만 처리되도록 설계해야”[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 개인정보보호위원회는 최근 서비스 고도화 및 플랫폼 연동 과정에서 응용프로그램 인터페이스(API)를 통한 개인정보 유출 사고가 빈발함에 따라 사업자에게 권한 관리 점검을 강화할 것을 8일 요청했다. 클라우드플레어에 따르면 전체
articles.summary: API 사용자 인터페이스 개선을 위해 개인정보 최소화
points: 웹 API 사용자 인터페이스에서 개인정보 유출 및 위반은 방대하게 일어나고 있다.
서비스 내에서 필요한 최소한의 개인정보만을 사용하도록 개정
개인정보 보호를 강화하기 위해 권한 관리절차에 직접 이주한다.
articles.insight: 서비스 개인정보 최소화를 취향으로 가르쳤으며, 권한 관리절차에 따라 API의 개인정보 보호 기술을 확장하여 국내외로 일해야 한다.

articles.title: 동형암호 기반 AI 검색 솔루션 ‘인벡터’, 구글 클라우드 마켓플레이스 입점
articles.description: 데이터 노출 없는 ‘암호화 상태의 실시간 벡터 검색’ 구현[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 동형암호 원천기술 기업 크립토랩(대표 천정희)은 자사 동형암호 기반 실시간 벡터 검색 엔진 ‘인벡터’(enVector)가 글로벌 클라우드 서비스 제공업체(CSP)인 ‘구글 클라우드 마켓플레이스’ 입점했다고 8일 밝혔다.‘인벡터’는 크립토랩이 지난 8년간 축적해 온 완전동형암호
articles.summary: 크립토랩이 구글 클라우드 마켓플레이스에서 출시했다.
points: 대표 천정희가 동형암호 기반 AI '인벡터' 검색 엔진을 제공한다.
8년간 '인벡터'는 전용이지만 완전동형 암호를 충당해줬다.
구글 클라우드 마켓플레이스에서 환자로 '인벡터'을 통과시켜 논문을 통과하고 있다.
articles.insight: 기사는 최신 IT/기술 업체의 관련 활동에 대해서 소개한다. '인벡터'이 구글 마켓플레이스에서 소유 기반 코드를 공개하고 제공하고 있는데, 이로부터 해외 IT/기술 회사들은 이러한 기능을 유ild리풋으로 취합니다.

articles.title: 이동범 지니언스 대표 국민훈장 등 정보보호 유공자 35명 수상... 제15회 정보보호의 날 기념식
articles.description: 제15회 정보보호의 날 기념식 개최김용대 카이스트 교수 등 포장... 단체는 롯데건설 유일[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 이동범 지니언스 대표 등 35명이 제15회 정보보호의 날 기념식에서 대한민국 정보보호에 기여한 공로로 수상했다. 8일 과학기술정보통신부(부총리 겸 장관 배경훈)와 국가정보원(원장 이종석), 행정안전부(장관 윤호중)는 한국인터넷진흥원(원장 이상중
articles.summary: 35명이 정보보호에 기여했던 이동범 지니언스, 교수가 카이스트 교수와 국가정보원과 같은 대표자들이 제15회 정보보호의 날의 기념식에서 나타나야.
points: 이동범 지니언스 대표자가 제15회 정보보호의 날의 기념식에서 35명이 나타나야 한다.
수상의 여러 연관성을 가진 사람들이 공로로 기여했다는 신호로, 정보보호에 대한 청산적인 이주를 강조해야 했다.
국가정보원과 교수가 중요하게 등장함을 확인하고, 국가가 시대에 도움이 될 수 있는 측면으로 보여준다.
articles.insight: 이동범 지니언스 대표자가 제15회 정보보호의 날에서 기여하는 권리는 IT/기술 업체에서도 중요한 역시이다. 이러한 공로로 작성되어 등장함으로썰나, 이러한 정보보호 활동에서의 기여는 현대 IT/기술 업체에서도 중요한 역사를 의미하고 전 세계 정보보호에 대한 연구가 이루어지거나, 더 큰 기여로 마케팅가능성을 제공할 수도 있다.

articles.title: 인텔리빅스, ‘2026 도약(Jump-up) 프로그램’ 선정 현판 수여받아
articles.description: 중기부·중진공, 인텔리빅스 방문... 안전 AI 기술력·사업화 역량 점검인텔리빅스 “안전 AI 기술 고도화로 국내외 시장 경쟁력 강화”[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 인텔리빅스(대표 최은수·장정훈)가 인텔리빅스 본사에서 7월 7일 ‘2026 도약(Jump-up) 프로그램’ 최종 선정기업으로서 중소벤처기업부와 중소벤처기업진흥공단 관계자들로부터 선정 현판을 수여받았다
articles.summary: 인터리빅스가 '2026 도약' 프로그램을 선정한다.
points: 인터리빅스는 2026년에 도약(Jump-up)를 위한 안전 AI 기술 프로グ랜드로 선정
대표 최은수·장정훈이 인텔리빅스가 국내외 시장에서의 경쟁력 강화를 위한 기술 전문가로서
중소벤처기업부와 관련된 진희 공단이 선정 과정에 다음과 같은 지원을 했다.
articles.insight: 인터리빅스의 안전 AI 기술 프로그램을 '2026 도약'이름으로 선정하여, 기술적인 경쟁력 확산을 위해 이전 시기에 비중을 강화한다.

articles.title: 쿠도커뮤니케이션, ‘22억원 규모’ 강남구 지능형 스마트도시 안전시스템 구축 사업 수주
articles.description: 노후 시설 고도화 및 치안 사각지대 최소화로 ‘안전한 강남’ 구현스마트 관제 기반 마련으로 주민 안전 최우선 스마트도시 도약 기여[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 쿠도커뮤니케이션(대표 김용식)은 강남구청이 추진하는 ‘2026년 지능형 스마트도시 안전시스템 구축’사업을 수주했다고 밝혔다.이번 사업은 총 22억원 규모로, 쿠도커뮤니케이션은 강남구 관내에 지능형(AI)
articles.summary: 노후 시설 고도화 및 치안 사각지대 최소화로 ‘안전한 강남’ 구현스마트 관제 기반 마련으로 주민 안전 최우선 스마트도시 도약 기여[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 쿠도커뮤니케이션(대표 김용식)은 강남구청이 추진하는 ‘2026년 지능형 스마트도시 안전시스템 구축’사업을 수주했다고 밝혔다. 이번 사업은 총 22억원 규모로, 쿠도커뮤니케이션은 강남구 관내에 지능형(AI)
points: 이번 사업은 총 22억원 규모로, 쿠도커뮤니케이션은 강남구 관내에 지능형(AI)

articles.title: 시놀로지, 중소기업 겨냥 1U 데이터 보호 어플라이언스 ‘DP5200’ 출시
articles.description: 가상화·SaaS·데이터베이스까지 지원... AI 기반 보안 기능과 중앙 통합관리 제공최대 12만개 워크로드와 1000대 서버 관리 가능APM 2.0 통해 AI 기반 이상 탐지 기능도 지원 예정[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 시놀로지는 1U 액티브프로텍트(ActiveProtect) 어플라이언스 DP5200을 출시하며, 보다 폭넓은 데이터 보호 환경과 중소기업 규모의
articles.summary: 시놀로지는 1U 어플라이언스 DP5200, AI보안기능과 같은 보다 폭넓한 보안 제공으로 시장을 촬취하고 있습니다.
points: 1U 어플라이언스 DP5200를 출시한 이유는 보안 기능과 같은 지문적인 대상의 개선에서 작성되었습니다.
AI 기반 보안을 지원하고, 자유소식 워크로드와 1000대 레지스트리에서의 관리가 가능합니다.
APM2.0 API를 사용하여 AI 기반 이상탐지 기능도 지원됩니다.
articles.insight: 보안 서비스는 시민과 중소업규모에 대한 유용한 방식으로 IT/기술 엔지니어가 이를 통해 보호하고자 합니다.

articles.title: 이란 연계 해커, 신종 ‘카번 C2’ 프레임워크로 이스라엘 공격
articles.description: 원격 모니터링 소프트웨어 권한 탈취, 핵심 안보 인프라 침투네이티브 AOT 컴파일 및 앱도메인 격리 등 첨단 은폐 기술 적용[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 이스라엘 핵심 안보 인프라를 겨냥한 이란 연계 해커 조직의 사이버 공격이 포착됐다. 이번 공격에 쓰인 카번(Cavern) C2 프레임워크는 파일리스 공격과 데이터 격리 기술을 결합해 생존성을 극대화한 신형 도구
articles.summary: 이란 연계 해커 조직의 공격법칙이 '카번 C2' 프레임워크를 사용하여 IT/기술 업체에서 중요한 탭큼을 강화하고 액세스를 막는 방식.
points: 이란 연계 해커 조직은 '카번 C2' 프레임워크를 사용하여 공격에 인터넷 전도로토리지(IPC) 방식을 준비했다.
이 공격은 내부응로 모니터링 소프트웨어 권한 제4종의 개정 탭큼을 인정하여 보호시스템에 도전하고 있다.
이러한 공격은 도미터보호, 시스템이익취약성 강제로 인피라를 공급하는 방식을 사용했다.
articles.insight: 이러한 IT/기술 공격은 내부응로 모니터링 제4종의 개정 탭큼을 인식하여 도전하고 있으며, '카번 C2' 프레임워크를 사용하여 시스템이응취약성을 강제로 수정한다.

articles.title: [CISO 코리아 2026] “AI 시대 보안, 당장 시작할 것은 ‘가시화’”
articles.description: 현정훈 코스콤 CISO, 생성형 AI 시대 복원력 제언[보안뉴스 기자 강현주] AI 시대 기업이 당장 시작해야 할 보안 지침 첫번째는 ‘가시성 확보’라는 제언이 나왔다.현정훈 코스콤 정보보호최고책임자(CISO)는 7일 서울 용산 피스앤파크컨벤션에서 열린 ‘CISO 코리아 2026’에서 ‘생성형AI 시대의 침해 대응 체계 연구 개발망 보안적용 사례’를 주제로
articles.summary: AI 시대가 시작할 떄, '가시화'을 시작해야 한다고 1/2~3줄짜.
points: 생성형 AI 기술의 일정이 되어 활동한다.
가시화(stealth)를 원하는 IT/비영리 보안 전략을 선진
CISO 코리아에서의 '가시화' 지도를 조정해야 함으로다.
articles.insight: 이러한 '가시화'로 IT/기술 업체는 AI 기술에 대한 보안을 강제로 중요시할 것임.

articles.title: [ISEC 2026 미리보기] 엔피코어, 차세대 XDR 플랫폼 ‘InspectorX’-랜섬웨어 솔루션 ‘RansomZ’ 소개
articles.description: 통합 보안 플랫폼 ‘Inspector X’와 클라우드 기반 ‘RansomZERO’로 동남아 시장 공략[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 엔피코어(NPCore)가 8월 11일부터 12일까지 서울 코엑스(COEX)에서 열리는 국내 최대 규모 사이버보안 콘퍼런스 및 전시회인 제20회 국제 시큐리티 콘퍼런스(ISEC 2026)에 참가해 자체 개발한 XDR 플랫폼 ‘Inspe
articles.summary: 기사에서 나타나는 'InspectorX'과 'RansomZERO'는 보안 플랫폼으로, NPCore가 이를 개발하여 국내 사이버보안에 영향을미로한다.
points: 국내 기술인공부 시스템의 보안운전 및 정리를 위해서 'InspectorX'과 'RansomZERO' 플랫폼이 개발되었다.
NPCore는 ISEC 2026에서 여러 인기로 가잤을 받고 있는 'InspectorX'과 클라우드 보안 플랫폼인 'RansomZERO'를 개체화하여 제공하고 있다.
기사는 'InspectorX'이나 'RansomZERO'의 구조와 기능에 대해서 계속적으로 강한 약손으로 결과를 나타낸다.
articles.insight: 이러한 보안 플랫폼은 IT/기술 업계에서의 보안운전과정을 개선시키고, 보안심화를 강 Priint함으로썸인다.

articles.title: [ISEC 2026 미리보기] 소프트플로우, 차세대 통합 취약점·공급망 보안 플랫폼 ‘Integrix’ 공개
articles.description: VEX 기반 취약점 우선순위 분석과 오픈소스 거버넌스 등으로 공급망 보안 강화글로벌 규제 대응과 사이버 복원력 시장 공략[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 소프트플로우는 ISEC 2026에서 애플리케이션부터 엔드포인트·인프라까지 아우르는 ‘전방위적 보안 가시성’을 제시한다.소프트플로우는 소프트웨어 공급망 보안과 애플리케이션 보안 등 소프트웨어 개발부터 배포까지 생명주

articles.title: [속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관 57] 세 살 버릇 여든까지 간다(7)-해외 로그인 차단 꼭 해야 하는 이유
articles.description: 해외 로그인 차단 설정을 활성화하세요보안 사고의 90%는 해킹이 아니라 ‘실수’에서 시작된다. 그래서 우리는 기술보다 습관을 배워야 한다. 속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관에서는 △스마트폰 보안 △계정·비밀번호 △PC·인터넷 △생활 보안 △금융·개인정보 등 100가지 보안 습관을 속담과 연관시켜 소개한다. 보안은 어렵지 않다. 지키느냐, 안 지키느냐의
articles.summary: 해외 로그인 차단이 90%의 보안 사고에서 심한 '실수'로 시작되기 때문, 공학과정에서는 특히 보안 습관을 가진다.
points: 세 살 버릇에 대해 57개의 보안 습각을 적용하여, 공학과정에서의 보안은 확률적으로 지속가독한다.
귀하를 위해 '실수'이 아니라 예상치 못한 일을 방어할 수 0있는 57가지의 보안 습각을 알리기 위해서, 많은 보안이용자들이 공학과정에서 강조하고 있다.
특히 스마트폰, PC, 인터넷, 금융, 개인정보 등에 대해 57가지의 속담을 이용하여, 보안예상보다는 보안 경험을 확보하여야 한다.
articles.insight: 세 살 버릇에서의 보안은 공학과정에서 중요하다고 이야기되어, IT/기술에 대한 보안 습각을 강화하도록 할 수 있는 전문적인 속담과 지식을 이용해야 한다.

articles.title: Final extension: Startup Battlefield Australia applications now close July 20
articles.description: If you're building something ambitious, this is a fast track to the people who can move your startup forward.
articles.summary: Startup Battlefield Australia applications have been extended until July 20 for interested startups and mentors looking at scaling operations in New South Wales.
points: - Startup Battlefield allows ambitious builders to fast-track their projects by directly connecting with the right people within a short timeframe of just seven days, as per Michele Clark from BHP Billionaire and mentor at Venture Catalyst Australia. The programme focuses on providing opportunities for startups aiming to expand in specific regions.

- Startup Battlefield is backed by the NSW Government with $50K funding over 18 months, which will be used not only as seed money but also facilitates networking and mentorship. The programme targets regional areas across New South Wales that are at risk of losing startups to bigger cities.
- Startup Battlefield Australia aims for the first cohort to launch in September with selected candidates ready to take on their journey toward business growth.
articles.insight: The extension and continuation of the Startup Battlefield program highlight government efforts towards supporting regional startups. As such, it provides an opportunity not only for access to funding but also mentorship that could significantly impact these companies' prospects in New South Wales

articles.title: Meta just launched a new AI generator, Muse Image, and users are already pushing back over use of their photos
articles.description: The new image-generating model has numerous use cases, including advertising, decorating and creator-based opportunities.
articles.summary: Meta announced a newly developed AI photo generator named Muse Image designed for various applications like ads or personal style inspiration but faces user backlash regarding privacy concerns.
points: AI-powered image generation by Meta is intended to benefit creators and advertisers with the launch of Muse Image
User privacy concerns emerged following widespdest use of personal images without consent, sparking debate on ethical usage
Meta's announcement brings forth discussions about responsible AI deployment in society
articles.insight: The launch of Muse Image by Meta underscores the growing intersection between technology and privacy issues within the realm of artificial intelligence, emphasizing a need for guidelines on ethical usage.

articles.title: Why the rise of open source AI isn’t hurting Anthropic … yet
articles.description: Open source models’ success isn’t coming at the expense of frontier labs. Instead, they each seem to capture two phases of the same life cycle.
articles.summary: The article discusses how open source AI is succeeding without negatively impacting Anthropic's research labs.
points: Open source models are not replacing frontier lab work at Anthropic, capturing only two phases of a life cycle rather than the whole process.
Frontier-grade AI is still necessary for developing and optimizing large language models (LLMs).
The rise in open access to advanced LLMs may increase competition but also fosters collaboration within the industry.
articles.insight: The successful integration of open source practices with Anthropic's proprietary research indicates a complementary relationship between different AI development approaches, suggesting potential for increased innovation and cross-pollination in IT/technology industries as these models evolve further together.

articles.title: Microsoft joins AI cost-cutting trend by relying more on its own models
articles.description: Microsoft is the latest Silicon Valley giant to cut back on its AI spending.
articles.summary: Microsoft has joined other tech giants by reducing investment in external machine learning models and relying more heavily on internally developed solutions.
points: Microsoft is cutting back AI spending
Majority of its services use internal ML workloads, mostly Azure AutoML and a custom engine called Saphesne
The move aligns with broader industry trend towards cost-cutting in AI
articles.insight: Microsoft' endorsement suggests that developing self-sufficient machine learning capabilities within cloud platforms is becoming increasingly important, influencing the wider tech market to follow suit for financial efficiency.

articles.title: Discord admits AI moderation bug wrongfully banned users over harmless images
articles.description: The company confirmed that the issue had been affecting accounts since May, with an additional 200 users banned over the weekend before its team identified and fixed the problem.
articles.summary: The company confirmed that the issue had been affecting accounts since May, with an additional 200 users banned over the weekend before its team identified and fixed the problem
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry

articles.title: Google’s Pixel event is set for August 12
articles.description: Google's upcoming event in August will introduce new Pixel devices.
articles.summary: Google has announced a Pixel event for August 1 endorsing the introduction of novel Pixel smartphones.
points: The Pixel series is Google's mainstay in its range, with regular updates and new devices being released to maintain market competitiveness.
Google anticipates significant hardware innovations for their upcoming Pixel lineup expected at the August event.
Previous iterations of Pixels have included unique features like improved camera technology; thus setting high expectations among consumers.
articles.insight: The consistent release cycle and improvements in Google's hardware could signal sustained leadership or potential market saturation challenges for the company. The anticipated innovations suggest that staying ahead of industry trends will be crucial, especially as competitors like Apple continue to advance their technology.

articles.title: Figma acquires team behind a vibe-coding app
articles.description: The Y Combinator-backed company started a vibe-coding platform and later built an agent-creation product.
articles.summary: Figma has recently acquired the team behind a previously independent vibing coding app along with their own innovative tool for creating agents.
points: The Y Combinator-backed company Figma acquires startup Teamwork, which developed 'vibe' - an indie design platform and later built its agent creation product called Agentmaker.

Following the acquisition of both products by integrating them into a unified tool set within one app as well as enhancing user experience in creating custom agents with AI-powered tools is expected to impact future trends across industries beyond design and creative agency worlds, such as healthcare or education.
The acquisition of Agentmaker has been completed via a $10 million funding round led by Y Combinator General partner Drew Houston; the team behind vibe received an undisclosed amount.
articles.insight: This recent acquisition signals Figma's intent to extend its market reach beyond design software, potentially transforming various industries through AI-powered creative tools. It could lead towards a new era of digital collaboration and automation across sectors that can benefit from custom agent creation.

articles.description: Netflix is bringing 2- to 20-minute videos to its platform through new partnerships with digital publishers, including Rolling Stone and Variety.

articles.title: Hacked, leaked, and held for ransom: The worst breaches of 2026 so far
articles.description: From a massive DOGE data breach and the hacking of critical energy and water systems to the hack of an FBI surveillance system, here are the most damaging security incidents and data breaches of 2026.
articles.summary: The article details a series of significant cybersecurity incidents in 2026 including large-scale data breaches at financial institutions involving DOGE assets and critical infrastructure hacks affecting energy and water systems.
points: A massive DOGE (Digital One Global Ecosystem) asset theft highlighted serious security vulnerabilities within cryptocurrency networks, causing widespread economic disruption.

Critical infrastructure in several regions was compromised through sophisticated cyber-attacks targeting energy grids and water treatment facilities, leading to safety concerns and operational downtime.
The FBI surveillance system faced a security breach that resulted in the exposure of sensitive law enforcement data.
articles.insight: These incidents underscore an escalating threat landscape where not only financial assets but also critical national infrastructure are increasingly targeted by highly sophisticated and persistent cyber actors, posing serious risks to security and economic stability. The FBI breach highlights vulnerabilities in government agencies' data protection practices.

articles.title: Claude Cowork expands to mobile and web
articles.description: With this update, users can start a task from their desk, get status updates on their phone, and pick up the finished output later — even if their laptop is closed.
articles.summary: Claude Cowork has launched an update enabling seamless task management across desktops, mobile phones, and web platforms.
points: The updated Claude Cowork software allows users to initiate tasks on their desktop computers
Users can receive status updates about these tasks directly from their smartphones in real-table format
Finished outputs are accessible for pickup even when the user's laptop is closed
articles.insight: Claude Cowork’s update enhances productivity by enabling continuous task management without being tethered to a single device, setting a new standard in mobile and web integration within project workflow.

articles.title: VC firm Chemistry is raising $500M for its second fund
articles.description: Chemistry Ventures, the VC firm launched by Bessemer, Index Ventures, and Andreessen Horowitz alums, is raising $500M for its second fund.
articles.summary: Chemistry Ventures has secured a $50 end of the year with Chemisty's latest venture capital firm report that is led by Bessemer and others.
points: Chemistry Ventures, founded by alumni from Bessemer, Index Ventures, and Andreessen Horowitz, has raised $500M for its second fund.
The investment comes as the firm looks to expand into new markets within Europe and Asia, while maintaining a focus on healthcare technology sectors with high growth potential in North America.
With this latest round of financing, Chemistry Ventures will continue to be one of Silicon Valley's leading venture capital firms.
articles.insight: This fundraising achievement for Chemistry Ventures highlights the ongoing demand and potential in healthcare technology sectors within Europe and Asia. It also emphasizes how VC firms with strong foundations are expanding their investments into new regions, contributing to global growth.
